scripts.build:wasm: cd .. && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --no-default-features --features wasm --release && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir web/pkg --out-name burn_autogaze target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/burn_autogaze.wasm
scripts.check:bevy-wgpu: cd bevy_wgpu_anchor && cargo tree --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -i wgpu && cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown
